title: Physics-Guided Operational Stiffness Proxies for Reduced-Order Screening of Harmonic Resonance Risk in 33/11 kV Distribution Substations
research_question: How can routinely available operational measurements be transformed into physics-guided indicators capable of screening harmonic resonance susceptibility in 33/11 kV distribution substations under sparse monitoring conditions?
objectives: Reconstruct operating regimes using medoid-based clustering.
Build reduced-order susceptibility score linked to resonance theory.
Train interpretable ordinal probabilistic risk model.
Validate robustness with temporal CV and benchmark methods.
